top.title: Iranian strikes on bases used by US caused $800m in damage, new analysis shows
top.summary: Much of the damage was caused in initial retaliatory strikes by Iran in the week after the US and Israel launched its operation.

top.title: Fans elated as BTS play first gig together in nearly four years
top.summary: RM, Jin, Suga, J-Hope, Jimin, V and Jung Kook perform together for the first time since October 2022.

top.title: Russian drone attack kills two in Ukraine ahead of talks in US, officials say
top.summary: Two children, aged 11 and 15 were also injured in the attack which took place in Zaporizhzhia.

top.title: Luke Littler applies to trademark his face to combat AI fakes
top.summary: The darts star's image has been used legally on darts merchandise, snacks and fashion brands.

top.title: Hargreaves Lansdown says IT issues which affected thousands are over
top.summary: The finance firm has apologised for the disruption to its website and app, which has angered many customers.

top.title: Publisher cancels horror novel's release over AI claims
top.summary: Author Mia Ballard denies having used AI herself when writing the horror story Shy Girl.
